3078880.name: All On Board! - The Hunger
3078880.description:
Get this DLC to host The Hunger sessions in All On Board!

All players need All On Board! to participate, but only the host must own this DLC, letting others join without having to buy it.

2-6 Players | 60 mins

Recommended Age: 12+

Hunt for blood and race against time in The Hunger, now adapted for VR in All On Board!

As the Eternal Roses bloom, vampires awaken to race through the labyrinth. Hunt humans for victory points, fulfill hidden missions, and acquire roses while moving quickly enough to return to the castle before dawn. The more you hunt, the slower your deck (and your escape) becomes.

Combine strategic deck-building with a race against time. Tempt familiars for bonuses, explore hidden locations, and weigh the risks of ambition versus survival. If you are caught outside when the sun rises, you are doomed.

Key Features:

- Strategic deck-building: Hunt humans, complete missions, and manage your deck

- Race against time: Return to the castle before sunrise or face elimination

- Hidden objectives: Fulfill secret goals for extra points and unique strategies

- Dynamic gameplay: Unique paths and challenges every game

- Includes a themed scenario and dedicated soundtrack

- Available in EFIGS (English, French, Italian, German, Spanish)

- Quick learning with a rulebook and video tutorial

Will you become the most notorious vampire, or will sunrise mark your doom?
3078880.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 法语, 意大利语, 德语
